titleStmt.title: SII 4.1021: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1021. (A.R. No. 195 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samasta
tilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁttaka ṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍavi
jayābharaṇa nijabhujō pā[¨r*]jita gaṁggākāvēripaṁ¨ryaṁttadharitrīpati saptamoviṣṇuva¨rddhana tribhuvanacakrava¨rtti
śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamāna vijayarājya saṁvatsara 31 ṇḍagu śrahi dina 383 ṇṭi . toṇḍanāṇḍaina jayaṁgoṇḍacō
ḍamaṇḍalamuna veṁgguṇḍrakōṭṭamuna marudālanāṭṭakkamuna vaivurūnu śōmuḍayanu caṁdraśēkharanu tiruveṁggāḍuḍayu
ṇḍaina gaṇḍaṟāditya pallavarayari koḍku yāgēṁdruni tamuṇḍu Arayanāyakuṇḍaina gurukularāyaru dākṣārāmamuna
śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku rātri dhūpamuna maṁtrabōnagamunaku Iddēvara dēvadānamaina guddavādināṁṭṭi dammilaEḍaḍa
pallini tirupalli viḍici tōṁṭṭatū¨rppuna saptagōdāvari Uttaramuna tū¨rppuna vellapolagarusuna paḍumaṟanu Uttaramuna
vurinūti dakṣiṇamunaṁggā naḍimitōṁṭṭa catussīmamulatō śrāvaṇasuddigā vilicina pōṁkkatōṁṭṭa muṇḍuvēla
mrāṁkkulapaṭṭu reṇḍuvēlu mrāṁkkulatōḍa mā tallitaṇḍrulaku dha¨rmmā ¨rttamugānu nitya nibandhamunaku 900 śilabhōga
mu goni sandhya 1 ṭiki tella ḍaṁggubrā kunadi yi pappuku 1 nu neyi mā 1 nu śa[¨r]kapa 1 nu naṁjuḍlu 4 nu peruvu ku 1 nu miri
yamulu Arasōla 1 nu pōṁkkalu 10 di yi Ākulu 40 diyi Iṁdula bhōgamu koni nityapaḍi Ācaṁdra¨rkkamu naḍapaṁggala
vārugānu dēvabhaṇḍaramunaṁ ggaladi śilāśasanamu veṭṭiṁciri .
Digital edition of SII 4.1021 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
